meaning: n.新约外传,(apocrypha)真实性(或权威性)可疑的著作
examples: These books, therefore, stand in the relation of Apocrypha to the Jewish Canon.
Why do you give me this tainted Apocrypha, this thousandth copy, this inept falsification?
And yet there need be no hesitation in relegating the Fourth Book of Esdras to the ranks of the apocrypha.
Large quests play out in a place called Apocrypha, A daedric realm that takes the form of a twisted, spectral library where demons prevent the player from ever getting a good book out.
